settings.title: Compare IPL Devices
settings.content: Find the perfect device for you

settings.title: Why choose IPL technology for hair removal?
settings.answer: IPL, or intense pulsed light, uses strong pulses of broad-spectrum light to target hair at the root. The light is absorbed by the melanin in the hair follicle, where it is then converted into heat, resulting in thinner regrowth and eventually stopping hair growth altogether. Ulike IPL devices are FDA Approved and offer a cost-effective, convenient solution compared to traditional methods of hair removal.

settings.title: Does IPL work on all skin tones and hair colours?
settings.answer: It's important to note that IPL is most effective for individuals with lighter skin tones and darker hair colours. This is because the light energy primarily targets the melanin pigment in the hair. In individuals with darker skin tones, excess melanin in the skin can also absorb the light energy, potentially causing skin damage. Similarly, IPL might be less effective for individuals with light hair colours like blonde, gray, or red. This is due to their lower melanin content, which makes it more challenging for the IPL device to effectively target the hair follicles. For ensured effectiveness and safety of IPL hair removal, we recommend users refer to the provided skin tone chart before making a purchase.

settings.title: Is IPL right for me?
settings.answer:
We do not recommend using IPL devices if you fall under any of these categories:
· A known skin disorder
· Skin diseases such as allergic dermatitis, eczema, etc.
· Photosensitive epilepsy
· Are menstruating, pregnant, or lactating
· Have cancer or are currently in remission
· sunburnt skin

settings.title: Is IPL safe?
settings.answer: Yes! IPL is a popular, well-researched option for safe and effective long-term hair removal. Ulike is FDA-cleared, FCC, CE, and RoHS certified for safe at-home use. Also, all UV rays are filtered to protect your skin.

settings.title: Are results permanent?
settings.answer: After completing the full treatment schedule, the treated area should be completely hairless or nearly so. However, when using your device, you are targeting hair follicles that are currently in the 'anagen' hair growth phase. It is possible that hairs not in the 'anagen' phase during treatment may still grow. You can simply use your Ulike device once every few weeks for touch-ups on these areas!

settings.title: Can I use the device on all parts of my body?
settings.answer:
Yes, you can use Ulike IPL devices on ALMOST every part of your body.
However, please avoid using it on the following areas:
-the eyes, or around the eyes
-tattooed areas
-parts of the skin with open wounds
-birthmarks, moles or warts
-areas that have plastic surgery
Please refer to the above question "Is IPL right for me" for further information.

settings.title: Can I use it on my pubic area?
settings.answer: Yes, Ulike IPL devices can be used on the skin around your genitals, such as the bikini area, Brazilian wax area, and buttocks, but please do not use them directly on your genitals.

settings.title: Does IPL treatment hurt?
settings.answer: No, unlike laser hair removal, IPL hair removal is generally considered to be much safer and less painful. Additionally, Ulike is the only company that employs Sapphire Ice-Cooling patented technology to ensure completely pain-free sessions.

settings.title: How often should I do treatments?
settings.answer:
We recommend using the device three times a week for the first month to achieve the best results. After that, you can use it once every two weeks or once a month for touch-ups as needed.

Furthermore, we advise tailoring your usage according to your hair growth. If you encounter areas with thicker hair or stubbornness, feel free to elevate the power level and frequency of usage. Always be mindful of your skin's reaction and make adjustments to prevent any discomfort.

settings.title: Can men also use Ulike IPL devices?
settings.answer: Of course! Men and women can both use our devices

settings.title: Do Ulike devices come with a warranty?
settings.answer: Yes! Every Ulike product comes with a 1 year limited manufacturer’s warranty. If your product stops working because of a manufacturing defect, it is eligible for a free replacement. Read more details about our warranties in our terms of service.
